scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 bun run dev:web & wait
scripts.dev:workers: (cd workers/eval-runner && bun run dev) & (cd workers/report-generator && bun run dev) & wait
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:api && bun run build:workers && bun run build:web
scripts.build:workers: (cd workers/eval-runner && bun run build) && (cd workers/report-generator && bun run build)
scripts.build:packages: (cd packages/shared && bun run build) && (cd packages/prompt-core && bun run build) && (cd packages/eval-core && bun run build) && (cd packages/model-registry && bun run build) && (cd packages/provider-adapters && bun run build) && (cd packages/admin-core && bun run build)
